mapper.sql: id, test_plan_id, project_id, env_instability_factor, total_cases, first_pass_rate, avg_cs_score, total_algo_write_ms, total_algo_exec_ms, write_deviation_rate, reuse_saving_hours, total_defect_count, start_time, end_time, last_calc_time, total_actual_exec_ms, total_actual_reading_ms, total_actual_time_ms, avg_exec_deviation_rate, complexity_variance
mapper.insert: insert into spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics (id, test_plan_id, project_id, env_instability_factor, total_cases, first_pass_rate, avg_cs_score, total_algo_write_ms, total_algo_exec_ms, write_deviation_rate, reuse_saving_hours, total_defect_count, start_time, end_time, last_calc_time, total_actual_exec_ms, total_actual_reading_ms, total_actual_time_ms, avg_exec_deviation_rate, complexity_variance) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{envInstabilityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalCases,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{firstPassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{avgCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalAlgoWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalAlgoExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{writeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reuseSavingHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalDefectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastCalcTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalActualExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalActualReadingMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalActualTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{avgExecDeviationRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{complexityVariance,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
mapper.update: update spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics set test_plan_id = #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, env_instability_factor = #{envInstabilityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_cases = #{totalCases,jdbcType=INTEGER}, first_pass_rate = #{firstPassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, avg_cs_score = #{avgCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_algo_write_ms = #{totalAlgoWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_algo_exec_ms = #{totalAlgoExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, write_deviation_rate = #{writeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reuse_saving_hours = #{reuseSavingHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_defect_count = #{totalDefectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_calc_time = #{lastCalcTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_actual_exec_ms = #{totalActualExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_actual_reading_ms = #{totalActualReadingMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_actual_time_ms = #{totalActualTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, avg_exec_deviation_rate = #{avgExecDeviationRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, complexity_variance = #{complexityVariance,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
